raw_data.comment: Dexter has demonstrated some improvement in his overall performance during the recent review period, and we appreciate the effort he has made toward completing assigned tasks. However, there are still areas that require improvement. Moving forward, it is important that Dexter take greater initiative in applying troubleshooting methodologies and fully utilizing available resources before escalating matters to senior technicians. We hope to see continued improvement in the coming month, particularly in terms of overall performance, adherence to established policies, and alignment with the standards and expectations that have been provided.
